message:
feat(demo): add mouse interactions + keyboard shortcuts to Mermaid Mega Showcase (bd-iuvb.17.10.4)

- Add mouse click handling for all panel regions (diagram, controls, side panel, footer)
- Left click diagram selects next node (inspect mode); right click deselects
- Scroll wheel on diagram zooms in/out; on side panel navigates samples; on controls cycles palette
- Cache layout regions via std::cell::Cell<Rect> for hit testing during view()
- Add 10 new mouse interaction tests (click, scroll, right-click, no-op, keybinding hints)
- Add mouse hint entries to keybindings (Click, Right-click, Scroll)
- Fix pre-existing clippy collapsible_if warning in form_validation.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
